name: Pam Croom
bio: Pam Croom serves as the Mayor of Wills Point, a city in Van Zandt County known as the 'Bluebird Capital of Texas.' Wills Point sits along Interstate 20 and has been growing as a bedroom community for the Dallas-Fort Worth area. The mayor works to balance growth with the city's small-town character.
campaignPromises: Manage growth from the expanding DFW metro area
Improve city roads and water infrastructure
Support local businesses along the I-20 corridor
